overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a motorcycle ride through Night City's neon-lit downtown district. The player navigates wet reflective streets past holographic advertisements, under massive overpasses, and through intersections with iconic cyberpunk signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial boulevard with holographic advertisements and glass towers

events.description: accelerating from stationary position onto the main thoroughfare
approaching intersection with visible traffic signals ahead

agents.ego_description: riding a red motorcycle with white decals through the city streets, accelerating smoothly past illuminated storefronts

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining distance

entered.detail: tall glass and steel buildings with illuminated windows towering over the street
large digital advertisements with green and pink neon lighting on building facades
floating holographic projections displaying animated commercial content above the street
modern high-rise buildings with reflective glass surfaces showing neon reflections

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide commercial boulevard in Night City, with towering cyberpunk skyscrapers lining both sides. The rider accelerates along wet asphalt that reflects the vibrant green and pink neon billboards and floating holographic advertisements. A silver sedan drives ahead in the distance as the motorcycle approaches an intersection with traffic signals.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection district with prominent KENDACHI signage and palm tree median

events.description: approaching the iconic KENDACHI corporate sign spanning across the street
executing a right turn at the intersection with yellow crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: navigating through the intersection, making a right turn while maneuvering around other vehicles

notable_agents.action: orange taxi passing through the intersection from the left side

entered.detail: large illuminated corporate signage with bold lettering spanning across the street width
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
tropical palm trees lining the sidewalk with green neon uplighting at their bases

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle approaches the iconic KENDACHI sign that spans the street, entering a district with distinctive yellow crosswalks. An orange taxi passes through the intersection from the left as the rider executes a right turn. Palm trees with neon uplighting line the right side of the road, replacing the dense holographic advertisements of the previous section.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass with concrete support pillars and digital billboards

events.description: entering darker underpass area with reduced ambient neon lighting and overhead shadows
purple sedan overtaking on the right side while entering covered roadway

agents.ego_description: accelerating through covered road sections, navigating between concrete barriers and support pillars at high speed

notable_agents.action: purple luxury sedan overtaking the motorcycle on the right side

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure with support pillars creating a covered roadway effect
orange and white striped road dividers separating traffic lanes
large illuminated screen displaying animated advertisements on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a semi-covered highway section beneath massive concrete overpasses, significantly reducing sky visibility. The lighting shifts to a darker, mixed ambiance with shadows from the support pillars. A purple sedan overtakes on the right as the rider navigates between concrete barriers. Digital billboards continue to illuminate the right side of the roadway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban tunnel with wall murals and industrial architecture

events.description: entering fully enclosed tunnel section with prominent CALIENTE neon sign visible on the left
emerging from darkest tunnel section into area with colorful wall murals and graffiti art

agents.ego_description: speeding through enclosed highway sections and gentle curves, navigating the tunnel environment

entered.detail: bright orange neon sign with cursive lettering mounted on the building facade
large painted artwork featuring a skull and red roses on a green background covering the building wall
enclosed roadway with overhead lighting, ventilation systems, and concrete ceiling

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle enters a narrow, enclosed tunnel section where the sky is completely obscured by overhead structures. The bright orange CALIENTE neon sign marks the left side while a striking mural of a skull with roses covers the right wall. The lighting becomes purely artificial with overhead fixtures illuminating the curved roadway as the rider navigates through the tunnel environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban expressway with red neon curb lighting and distant city skyline

events.description: navigating a gentle left curve on the elevated roadway while maintaining cruising speed
approaching final intersection with hanging traffic signals showing green light

agents.ego_description: cruising along the elevated expressway at high speed, maintaining a steady line through gentle curves

notable_agents.action: distant vehicle with visible brake lights driving ahead on the elevated road

entered.detail: raised expressway with distinctive red neon accent lighting along the curbs and barriers
tall illuminated skyscrapers visible in the far distance against the night sky
hanging traffic lights suspended over the roadway showing green illumination

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens onto an elevated expressway with distinctive red neon curb lighting, emerging from the enclosed tunnel. The road stretches forward toward distant illuminated towers visible on the horizon. The rider cruises at high speed through gentle curves, approaching a traffic signal showing green. The environment transitions back to open sky with the elevated highway structure continuing into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed motorcycle ride that transitions from a wide, neon-drenched commercial boulevard into a series of enclosed urban structures before emerging onto an elevated expressway. It begins by accelerating along wet asphalt reflecting vibrant green and pink holograms, moving toward a wide intersection where the rider turns right past a massive KENDACHI sign and neon-lit palm trees. As the open city gives way to denser architecture, the scene shifts beneath massive concrete overpasses and into a narrow tunnel, where the lighting becomes purely artificial and the walls are adorned with a skull mural and a bright orange CALIENTE sign. The camera then emerges from the enclosure onto an elevated highway marked by red neon curb lighting, leaving the shadows behind. Finally, the view opens back up to the night sky as the rider cruises toward distant illuminated towers on the horizon.
